name: Gingerbread People/Dessert Show
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dark brown sugar; firmly packed
Prepared icing in tubes and gels, all different colors
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Whisk together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and cloves in a bowl.
3. In a large bowl, using an electric mixer, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and molasses; beat until smooth on medium speed.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, mixing on low until well combined.
6. Divide dough into two balls and flatten each into a disk. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour until firm.
7. On a floured surface, roll out dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
8. Using floured gingerbread "men" cookie cutters, cut out the dough shapes. Gather scraps and roll them out as well, cutting additional shapes.
9. Place the cutouts about 1/2 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. If desired, use raisins for eyes or other decorations; press into the dough lightly.
11. Bake for 10 minutes until set but not overcooked.
12. Transfer cookies to a cool flat surface and allow to cool completely before decorating with icing in various colors.
